title: Abul Qasim ibn Mohammed al-Ghassani
body: Abul Qasim ibn Mohammed ibn Ibrahim al-Wazir al-Ghassani al-Andalusi (Arabic: أبو القاسم بن محمد بن إبراهيم الغساني) (1548–1610), also known as Al-Wazir al-Ghassani, was a prominent Moroccan physician, botanist, and diplomat at the Saadian court during the reigns of Sultan Ahmad al-Mansur and Zidan Abu Maali.
categories: Ambassadors of Morocco to the Netherlands
